Telegram Settings
Configure inbound and outbound Telegram integration.
Bot Token
Telegram bot token from BotFather.
Default Chat ID
Chat ID for outbound digests.
Webhook URL
Public URL ending with /telegram_webhook.
Webhook Secret
Optional secret header value.
Shared Agent Context
Route all inbound messages into a single context.
Webhook Status
